chunks.text: Center for Advancing Women in Technology launches Technology Pathways Initiative - EECS at Berkeley Center for Advancing Women in Technology (CAWIT) in collaboration with U.C. Berkeley, San Francisco State University and San José State University, through $3M in investment from Intel Corporation, KLA-Tencor Foundation, and Salesforce, will launch the Technology Pathways Initiative (TPI), to increase participation of women in CS fields through the development of new interdisciplinary CS degree programs at three pilot campuses in 2017. Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu has been developing the Women In Technology workshop at UC Berkeley. Categories Diversity Education Faculty View Open Faculty Positions
